description: Payment service is failing after a bad deploy and users cannot complete checkout.

initial_alerts.name: payment_high_error_rate
initial_alerts.message: Payment service error rate 94% — users cannot checkout

hint: A deploy was pushed to payment service 10 minutes ago.

description: Database connection pool exhaustion is slowing requests and causing intermittent failures.

initial_alerts.name: database_connection_pool_exhausted
initial_alerts.message: Database connection pool utilization is at 99%

hint: Connection pool saturation started after traffic doubled during a flash sale.

description: An overloaded database is causing payment failures while an unrelated auth alert adds noise.

initial_alerts.name: payment_checkout_failures
initial_alerts.message: Payment requests are failing due to downstream dependency timeouts

initial_alerts.name: database_cpu_saturation
initial_alerts.message: Database CPU remains above 95% for the last 15 minutes

initial_alerts.name: auth_jwt_refresh_warning
initial_alerts.message: Auth token refresh retries increased slightly after a config reload

description: A bad auth deploy is degrading order and payment flows while multiple unrelated alerts distract the responder.

initial_alerts.name: auth_5xx_spike
initial_alerts.message: Auth service 5xx rate spiked after the last deployment

initial_alerts.name: payment_dependency_latency
initial_alerts.message: Payment service latency increased while waiting on auth responses

initial_alerts.name: frontend_static_asset_warning
initial_alerts.message: A CDN edge reports stale frontend assets in one region

initial_alerts.name: database_backup_lag_notice
initial_alerts.message: Nightly backup lag exceeds the informational threshold

description: A critical database incident is cascading into payment outages while noisy alerts and a faulty metric obscure the root cause.

initial_alerts.name: payment_total_checkout_failure
initial_alerts.message: Checkout requests fail for nearly all users

initial_alerts.name: database_primary_cpu_critical
initial_alerts.message: Database primary CPU is saturated and query queues are building

initial_alerts.name: order_backlog_growth
initial_alerts.message: Order service backlog is growing because payment confirmations are missing

initial_alerts.name: frontend_js_exception_spike
initial_alerts.message: Frontend alert shows elevated JS exceptions, but the metric panel reads 0.0 error rate

initial_alerts.name: auth_cache_rewarm_notice
initial_alerts.message: Auth cache rewarming is slower than usual after maintenance

initial_alerts.name: payment_disk_io_warning
initial_alerts.message: Payment node disk IO warning appeared during background compaction
